summary: Full-stack testing of FitCheck landing page + auth. Backend: 13/13 pytest cases passed for /api/auth/register, /login, /logout, /me, /refresh incl. duplicate email, short password, invalid email, wrong password, unknown user, unauth /me, and no-refresh-token edge cases. Frontend: Playwright e2e verified landing sections, navbar, hero CTA, 3 feature cards, footer, modal open via CTA and navbar, Escape + outside-click close, signup, duplicate-email error renders as string (no React crash), wrong-password 401 error shown, successful login, and logout transitions navbar back to Log in + Sign up. httpOnly cookies confirmed set on register and cleared on logout (fresh request returns 401).
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx and Navbar.jsx each render their own <AuthModal/> instance — harmless but duplicated; consider lifting modal state to a shared context to avoid two mounted modals on the page.
Backend set_auth_cookies uses secure=False — acceptable for preview env but must be True in production when served over HTTPS (set via env flag).
CORS_ORIGINS fallback '*' combined with allow_credentials=True is invalid per CORS spec; ensure CORS_ORIGINS env is always set explicitly in every deployment.
register/login return ISO created_at while /auth/me returns datetime — minor inconsistency in response serialization (functional but non-uniform).
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates one ephemeral user in MongoDB users collection via public signup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: backend_test.py covers all auth endpoints with create→verify pattern. Frontend Playwright flow confirmed modal, signup, duplicate error, wrong password, login, logout. No open issues.
